articles.title: Get Ready to Laugh: Comedian Matt Buechele's New Podcast Drops May 1!
articles.summary: Have you ever laughed so hard you cried? Comedian Matt Buechele, known for his funny videos about life, is launching a new podcast called 'That Sounds Like a Lot.' It starts May 1 with guest Zach Zimmerman.

articles.title: Wait, Teachers Are Actually Earning LESS Now? Here's Why
articles.summary: You might think a pay raise means more money, but for U.S. teachers, inflation is eating it all up. A new report says the average teacher salary is $74,495, but after adjusting for rising prices, they're earning less than in 2017.

articles.title: A Tiny Election in Gaza Just Made Big News—Here's Why
articles.summary: For the first time in over 20 years, part of Gaza held an election. It happened in Deir al-Balah, a community spared from ground invasion. Only 23% of people voted, but officials call it a step toward future presidential elections.
